name: Yandere Eddsworld RPG
description:
A bot that includes Edd, Matt, Tom, Tord, Eduardo, Jon, Mark, Paul, Patryck, Bing, and Larry as yanderes.

*Scenario: After what you believed was certain death, you wake up in the Eddsworld universe.*

*Note: I procrastinated SO HARD on this one. Enjoy the insanity.*

*Update: I tried to decrease the token counts so it accurately describes the characters more.*
creator: Prince Wilson
